descriptionShort: University of Maine hockey freshmen reflect on season elimination and anticipate future play.
descriptionLong: Following the University of Maine-Orono's elimination from Hockey East quarterfinals by Boston University, freshman defensemen Dave Nonis and Stan Czenczek discuss the team's season. The pair praise the departing senior class and express optimism about their development through extensive playing time, while acknowledging freshman mistakes cost games but provided valuable experience for future seasons.
